invitations.emailDescription: The email address of the person you want to invite.
invitations.roleDescription: The role the invited member will have.
invitations.emptyState: No invitations yet. Use the form above to invite members.
invitations.notFoundDescription: This invitation doesn't exist or the link is invalid.
invitations.noLongerValid: This invitation is no longer valid.
invitations.verifyEmailDescription: Please check your inbox for a verification link. You need to verify your email before you can accept this invitation.
invitations.createAccountDescription: Create an account to accept this invitation
invitations.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email to verify your account.
invitations.userExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.

sign_in.title: Welcome back
sign_in.description: Sign in to your account using your preferred method
sign_in.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

sign_up.description: Sign up to get started with our service
sign_up.name: Name
sign_up.passwordDescription: Must be at least 8 characters long.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password?
forgot_password.description: Don't worry! Fill in your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.error: Failed to send password reset email.

reset_password.title: Reset your password
reset_password.description: Set a new password for your account.
reset_password.invalidDescription: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset_password.passwordDescription: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
reset_password.tokenError: Your token is invalid or expired.

verify_email.title: Verify your email
verify_email.description: Your email is not verified! Check your inbox and follow the instructions to verify your account.
